meta.title: Machine Breakdown (MTBF / MTTR)
meta.description: A single processor subject to random failures. Time-to-failure is measured on the operating (busy) basis with MTBF=90 operating units; repair takes MTTR=10 units. The processor is kept saturated by a fast source, so steady-state throughput equals availability times nominal capacity. Uses constant MTBF/MTTR to give an exact availability target.

expected.measure: Sink.total / elapsed ~ 0.9 per time unit; Processor down-time fraction ~ 0.1
